name: Bead of Force
overview: This small black sphere measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 4 Beads of Force are found together.

properties.activation: You can take a Magic action to throw the bead up to 60 feet.

explosion.impact: The bead explodes on impact and is destroyed

force_sphere.description: A sphere of transparent force encloses the area for 1 minute.
force_sphere.containment: Any creature that failed the save and is completely within the area is trapped inside this sphere.
force_sphere.partial_containment: Creatures that succeeded on the save or are partially within the area are pushed away from the center of the sphere until they are no longer inside it.
force_sphere.air_only: Only breathable air can pass through the sphere's wall. No attack or other effect can pass through.

properties.movement: An enclosed creature can take a Utilize action to push against the sphere's wall, moving the sphere up to half the creature's Speed.
properties.portability: The sphere can be picked up, and its magic causes it to weigh only 1 pound, regardless of the weight of creatures inside.
